channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ICE conducted 37 investigations into officer misconduct in last year
item.description: The disclosure from the agency's acting director came after immigration officers shot two U.S. citizens, intensifying questions about ICE officers' ta...

item.title: Federal judge orders return of Venezuelan migrants deported to El Salvador under Alien Enemies Act
item.description: In his Thursday order, U.S. District Court Judge James Boasberg ordered the government to allow any of the men deported last year to El Salvador to ap...

item.title: Have astronomers witnessed the birth of a black hole?
item.description: A massive star in the nearby Andromeda galaxy has simply disappeared. Some astronomers believe that it's collapsed in on itself and formed a black hol...

item.title: 54-year-old U.S. curler sets new American Winter Olympics age record
item.description: Rich Ruohonen has tried to get to the Olympics for almost 40 years. He finally got his chance, taking to the ice at the Milan Cortina Games representi...

item.title: Ukrainians rally in support of Olympian Vladyslav Heraskevych, banned for his helmet
item.description: Ukrainians are uniting in solidarity with Olympic skeleton racer Vladyslav Heraskevych after he was disqualified for wearing a helmet with images of U...

item.title: Marine declared dead after falling overboard in Caribbean
item.description: Lance Cpl. Chukwuemeka E. Oforah died at the age of 21 after falling overboard from the USS Iwo Jima, the Marine Corps said.

item.title: Poll analysis on words voters pick to describe Republican, Democratic parties
item.description: Most voters call the Democratic Party weak, while most describe the GOP as extreme.

item.title: 'My son is dead': Swiss bar owners confronted by fire victim families
item.description: Jessica and Jacques Moretti are under criminal investigation for involuntary manslaughter, as well as bodily harm and arson through negligence.

item.title: IOC criticised for selling Nazi-era Olympics T-shirt
item.description: The International Olympic Committee defends the T-shirt as being part of its Heritage Collection, celebrating styles from all editions of the Games.

item.title: Judge blocks US military from demoting Mark Kelly over 'illegal orders' video
item.description: After the retired Navy captain told servicemembers they don't have to obey illegal orders, Defence Secretary Hegseth moved to cut his rank.

item.title: Minnesota immigration enforcement surge is ending, Trump border tsar says
item.description: Two US citizens were killed in Minneapolis during the crackdown dubbed "Operation Metro Surge".

item.title: 1/15: The Takeout with Major Garrett
item.description: Venezuelan opposition leader meets with President Trump at White House; Poll suggests Talarico leading Crockett in Texas Senate primary

item.title: A timeline of Nancy Guthrie's disappearance as search stretches on
item.description: Savannah's Guthrie's mom, Nancy Guthrie, was reported missing Feb. 1, and authorities have still not identified a possible suspect.

item.title: Senate fails to advance DHS funding, teeing up partial shutdown
item.description: The Senate failed to advance a measure to fund the Department of Homeland Security on Thursday, paving the way for another partial government shutdown...

item.title: Trump revokes landmark ruling that greenhouse gases endanger public health
item.description: The White House calls it the largest deregulation in US history, but environmentalists say it will prove costly for Americans.

item.title: Few leads in Guthrie investigation after 11 days, yet cases often break unexpectedly
FBI combs desert terrain for clues in Nancy Guthrieâs disappearance
Pentagon let CBP use anti-drone laser before FAA closed El Paso airspace, AP sources say
item.description: The agency says it will ground all flights to and from the airport for âspecial security reasons.â
